query: How is the USRSEC user security file accessed?

results.name: STARTBR-USER-SEC-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COUSR00C.cbl
Program: COUSR00C - CICS COBOL Program - List all users from USRSEC file
Paragraph: STARTBR-USER-SEC-FILE (lines 586-618)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-USRLST-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph STARTBR-USER-SEC-FILE in COUSR00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-USRLST-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
STARTBR-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS STARTBR
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                RIDFLD    (SEC-USR-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF SEC-USR-ID)
      *         GTEQ
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   CONTINUE
                   SET USER-SEC-EOF TO TRUE
                   MOVE 'You are at the top of the page...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRLST-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRLST-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      READNEXT-USER-SEC-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.content:
READNEXT-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READNEXT
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                INTO      (SEC-USER-DATA)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF SEC-USER-DATA)
                RIDFLD    (SEC-USR-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF SEC-USR-ID)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN DFHRESP(ENDFILE)
                   CONTINUE
                   SET USER-SEC-EOF TO TRUE
                   MOVE 'You have reached the bottom of the page...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRLST-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRLST-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      READPREV-USER-SEC-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: READ-USER-SEC-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COUSR02C.cbl
Program: COUSR02C - CICS COBOL Program - Update a user in USRSEC file
Paragraph: READ-USER-SEC-FILE (lines 320-357)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph READ-USER-SEC-FILE in COUSR02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
READ-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                INTO      (SEC-USER-DATA)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF SEC-USER-DATA)
                RIDFLD    (SEC-USR-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF SEC-USR-ID)
                UPDATE
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to save your updates ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: READ-USER-SEC-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COUSR03C.cbl
Program: COUSR03C - CICS COBOL Program - Delete a user from USRSEC file
Paragraph: READ-USER-SEC-FILE (lines 267-304)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR03, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph READ-USER-SEC-FILE in COUSR03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR03, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
READ-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                INTO      (SEC-USER-DATA)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF SEC-USER-DATA)
                RIDFLD    (SEC-USR-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF SEC-USR-ID)
                UPDATE
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to delete this user ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COUSR02C.cbl
Program: COUSR02C - CICS COBOL Program - Update a user in USRSEC file
Paragraph: UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE (lines 358-394)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE in COUSR02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS REWRITE
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                FROM      (SEC-USER-DATA)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF SEC-USER-DATA)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been updated ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Update User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COUSR01C.cbl
Program: COUSR01C - CICS COBOL Program - Add a new Regular/Admin user to USRSEC file
Paragraph: WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE (lines 238-278)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR01, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS, PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE in COUSR01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR01, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS, PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
WRITE-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS WRITE
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                FROM      (SEC-USER-DATA)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF SEC-USER-DATA)
                RIDFLD    (SEC-USR-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF SEC-USR-ID)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR1AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been added ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN DFHRESP(DUPKEY)
               WHEN DFHRESP(DUPREC)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID already exist...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
      *            DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Add User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRADD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
